title: Russell Hobbs BW06572 Classic Collection 5 Piece Pan Set, 14/16/18/20/24 cm, Stainless Steel, Non-Stick, Suitable for Induction, Gas and Electric Hobs, Includes Tempered Glass Lids, 5 Year Guarantee
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
features: With a stainless steel body and handless these Russell Hobbs pans are easy to manoeuvre and suitable for dishwasher use.
With the vented tempered glass lids for the saucepans and the non-stick frying pan this set will transform your kitchen.
These pans are easy to handle and are suitable for cooking on gas, electric, solid hot plates halogen, radiant ring and induction hobs.
The high quality pans are long lasting and come with a 5 year guarantee, while the classic design is sure to look great in any kitchen.
Whether you are starting a cookware collection for a new home or replacing your existing set, this pan set is the perfect choice.
description: Product Description Classic Collection 5-Piece Pan Set This Russell Hobbs classic pan set is the ideal way to revolutionise your cookware. Made from high quality stainless steel, they come in a set of five. The set consists of a 14 cm milk pan, 16, 18 and 20 cm saucepans with tempered glass lids and a 24 cm non-stick frying pan. The lightweight pans are easy to manoeuvre around the kitchen and are suitable for dishwasher cleaning. Designed to keep a long-lasting shine, this set is sure to look great in your kitchen. Previous page Stainless Steel Crafted from durable stainless steel, these durable pans a perfect for any kitchen. Hob Types Suitable for use on all hob types, including induction, these pans offer long-lasting quality. Handles The hollow stainless steel handles are lightweight and comfortable to grip; ideal for busy kitchens. Mirror The shiny mirror polished finish looks traditional and attractive while cooking and is made to last. Easy Clean This 5-piece pan set is conveniently dishwasher safe for a quick and easy clean after use. Next page 1 Stainless Steel 2 Hobs 3 Handles 4 Mirror 5 Easy Clean Always Trusted Russell Hobbs offers a wide range of household essentials, specifically designed to help with chores, in the kitchen and beyond. With stunning pans that are both practical and attractive, high quality bakeware, laundry solutions and long-lasting kitchen utensils. All of Russell Hobbs products are high quality and trusted nationwide.
